reasoning: The baseline EIA value on 2026-01-18 is its most recent known value: 2.779 (published Jan 12). Wholesale gasoline (RBOB futures) surged on Jan 9, and the AAA national average has already reflected this upward shift, rising from $2.81 to $2.84 by Jan 15. Since EIA retail pump prices are collected on Mondays and typically lag wholesale changes slightly, the next EIA release on Jan 19 (which will be the most recent value available by the Jan 25 resolution date) is highly likely to increase. Furthermore, seasonal factors strongly favor gasoline price increases in January and February as refiners begin transitioning to summer-blend fuels and conduct maintenance. This supports continued elevated prices for the Feb 17 resolution, though I am applying a larger uncertainty discount to the more distant horizon per the system instructions.
